recommendations.title: Cool as Ice

recommendations.title: Anatomy of a Fall
recommendations.overview: A woman is suspected of her husband's murder, and their blind son faces a moral dilemma as the sole witness.

recommendations.title: The Bikeriders
recommendations.overview: After a chance encounter, headstrong Kathy is drawn to Benny, member of Midwestern motorcycle club the Vandals. As the club transforms into a dangerous underworld of violence, Benny must choose between Kathy and his loyalty to the club.

recommendations.title: Fonzy
recommendations.overview: Set in Paris, a man working in fish delivery becomes involved in a legal battle with his sperm donations.

recommendations.title: There Is No Evil
recommendations.overview: Set against the backdrop of Iran's strict and oppressive legal system, this anthology film tells the stories of four men who each face a moral crisis when having to deal with death penalties.

recommendations.title: The Children's Train
recommendations.overview: In late 1940s Italy, a mother makes the difficult decision to send her son to the north, where he catches glimpses of a new life away from poverty.

recommendations.title: Only the Strong

recommendations.title: Bhoothnath
recommendations.overview: Moving into a new house, a family witnesses an unfriendly ghost who wants to drive them away from the house. However, he befriends a little boy who changes his outlook forever.

recommendations.title: Danny Boy

recommendations.title: The Perfect Patient
